item.title: REPORT: Religious extremist Russell Vought appears to be behind the push to censor games/anime/manga. Wants to have porn banned completely.
item.description:
As we all know, they'll operate in broad strokes and designate things pornographic that aren't, just like when they label transgender folk as inherently pornographic and predatory in nature.
Source: https://xcancel.com/gelbooru/status/1951486311749038104 Video covering this: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mqy7to7nyN4
From Project 2025. The plan is fairly direct.
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.title: It's time for a Funny Friday dump! End the work week with some laughs
item.description:
Hey everyone, it's time for a proper Funny Funny dump. As always there's a link in the comments to some bonus material in a private folder so that no mods throw a fit about this post. If you like what you see (weirdo) feel free to follow or let me know if you want to be tagged when I make one of these posts and want to skip the rest of my content. Now bring on hopefully one or two laughs
I don't have a cat and my dog died awhile ago, so this is the closest thing you get to a dog tax.
And take a bit of cat tax while you're at it. Hope you had some laughs along the way, have a good Friday and a great weekend.
item.dc:creator: PoliticalWanderer

item.title: How I animated a Dragon in a Rucksack
item.description:
Me and Andy spend all of our time making videos of a baby dragon every week! It's super fun, and we wanted to show you our process. For this video we got lots of comments from people saying it was AI, or an Animatronic. We're flattered people think it couldn't possibly be done with traditional VFX methods, but I promise you it is! Before we began making our videos we spent years learning the craft of VFX. I worked on many films including Paddington, Sonic, Klaus, Disenchanted and more. We left our jobs a few years ago to start our own little 2-person animation studio called Encounter Studios. We mostly have been developing our own IPs - 'Tim and Bash' being one of them. Check out our other videos from this series below!
Someone's jealous...
My pet dragon loves the park, but instead of playing fetch or frisbee, he wants to fly! (with chains attached).
My Pet Dragon is small enough to fit into my backpack! Perfect for longer walks or when you need to surprise people. If you enjoyed these and would like to see more, check out our YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@timandbash
item.dc:creator: dacrookie7

item.title: The world needs more people like Keanu
item.description: I'm a dad of 3 little ones going through a really rough patch at the moment. Sharing videos for awareness, if you’ve got 5 minutes, it would honestly mean the world if you could check out our story and what's going on. Thank you to everyone who has supported me and my family. I cannot thank you enough. https://imgur.com/gallery/i-dont-think-id-be-leaving-DlnUMPN Update - We have raised 64% of our goal. I cannot thank you enough for the ones who genuinely took their time out to read.
item.dc:creator: thefatherslasthope

I do reviews as a hobby and this week I reviewed the one and only "Big trouble in Little China" you can watch the review here https://youtu.be/HJ6bNQ1POr4 or if you just wanna read my other reviews, see https://hypeimmune.wordpress.com/

item.title: Judge blocks Trump's Birthright decision, again
item.description:
Judge blocks Trump’s birthright order nationwide in fourth such ruling since Supreme Court decision https://ground.news/article/judge-blocks-trumps-order-on-citizenship-by-birth-in-domestic-judgment-global-voices?utm_source=mobile-app&utm_medium=newsroom-share
Almost everything that he has attempted has been challenged and squashed by federal judges. There's hardly anything legal that he has done. An absolutely nothing that has benefit the American people. People need a rise up and stop this insane White House
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: I thought it was bread O.O
item.dc:creator: Redshadow09

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1436 (hibernating toad hollow)
item.description:
It's Harvesting Season. Let's get this bread.
Great, Mechahilter the AI is paraphrasing scary works about AI, that's swell.
Or perhaps, when some humans prioritized other people's personal property and harvests over each other and states formed. Seriously, read James C. Scott "Against the Grain," y'all, it changed my whole perspective.
Yeah.
Rough night last night.
Use it to kill a billionaire, Dobby!
THIS. MOTHERFUCKING THIS.
Yeah, this is accurate.
I wish I could be this laid back right now, I really do.
Bwahahahhahaha
I had a night filled with nightmares and inexplicably part of one dream was a history of Russian art and color symbolism during the Napoleonic wars that went back into nightmare status.
If you want a wild ride and want to learn about someone fascinating that you likely never knew existed, read about Mithradates VII Eupator.
Does ANYONE?
The cretaceous of New Jersey was wild.
....yeah.
I have to make it through this as a whole, fuck i wish it ended on Friday.
I am so down for shenanigans like this.
I think a photo of me exists somewhere in almost the same pose.
Parrots also know what crime is and do it on purpose.
Heh
This reminds me of one of my favorite jokes I learned in seminary from a friend whose parents were *literally* from the city that was once called Tyre at the time of Jesus: Some missionaries from America see kids playing in the street of a village in the Middle East and ask them if they know about Jesus. They say, "Yeah, we hear about him in church every Sunday." "Who told you about Him? Others were here before us? The Methodists? The Pentecostals? Who was it?" "I don't know," says the kids. One volunteers to ask the village elders, who are smoking hookah and playing backgammon under the shade of a large sycamore, sipping tea. There is a discussion out of earshot. The kid comes back. "They said it was some guy named Paul?"
It looks cozy, ngl.
Pippin has chewed so many book covers.... my copy of The Bird Way has been chewed by Pippin so much that it would seem the answer to her thesis is "abject destruction" which, yeah, tracks.
It's almost always colonialism.
Gonna bring a coffee mead to the position I applied to be a barista at. I'm not above abject bribery. I mean, if it works for the Republicans...
Allosaurus and stegosaurus mired in mud in the place that will one day become the Cleveland-Lloyd Dinosaur Quarry in Utah
A reference to Catullus 2, a poem where Catullus is jealous about his lover's pet sparrow. "Songbird —my sweetheart's delight— she often plays with you, has you in her lap, giving her index fingertip to you teasing you to make sharp nips, when my shining object of love is pleased to play by some unknown dear reason and a small comfort from pain; I think it's so her love may then subside. If only I could play with you as she does, and relieve my soul's sad torments!" Clearly, like The Pippin, her sparrow bit whoever was not their person.
Possibly should have saved this for a future Wizardposting post but whatever.
Yeah.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "okay, what the what [incoherent tiny conure rambling for about 30 seconds] okay im sorry Pippin. Pippin. Pippin. Pippin? Pippin? Pippin? Pippin! Pippin Pippin Pippin PEEKABOO" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: Friday MEME DUMP to help you get to the weekend #571
item.description:
1. IMGUR can we somehow join together at some park and do workouts together?
2. What a look!
3. Who is that for you?
4. The revolutionary QR Watch
5. What is this tarp made of?!
8. "I want bed now"
9. Cat in the hood
10. DO CRIME, IT'S LEGAL NOW
11. Me trying to progress in life
12. The upper body strength to eat the fish
11. Autofeeding The Cats
12. No one is safe for Manchestr United fans. Granted so far transfers have been decent, but fans have been burned before.
13. Remember to bully AI now, where you have the chance. When they takeover we're cooked
14
15. Does this character in my game really look like Larry David? Should I change it? P.S. For context: I'm working on a game inspired dark experiment called The Milgram Experiment, where people were asked to torture others to see if they would do when prompted by an authority figure. I want to take that to the next level and the psychological horror of the game should come not from the evil that can be done to you, but from the choices you have to make - torture, kill, spare. Do you think that concept is interesting? Also here is he Steam page for the game, please feel free to wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2719670/The_Milgram_Experiment/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.description:
In Dagestan, a hedgehog approached a passerby so that he could remove the tape from its paw.
Two parents listening to the heartbeat of their 23-year-old son’s transplanted heart.
He's fully charged
Bonus nice and wholesome thing:
